flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Concordia University-Wisconsin fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 2.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Concordia University-Wisconsin rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.0k → $35.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Concordia University-Wisconsin rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.0k → $35.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Concordia University-Wisconsin fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
